inputs.label: Source Activity
inputs.businessContext: Enter the activity of the radioactive source in curies.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the activity of the radioactive source in curies.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Radyoaktif kaynağın aktivitesini curie cinsinden girin.

inputs.label: Gamma Constant
inputs.businessContext: Specific gamma constant for the isotope in R*m²/(Ci*h).

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific gamma constant for the isotope in R*m²/(Ci*h).

inputs.label: Distance
inputs.businessContext: Distance from the source in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance from the source in meters.

inputs.label: Shield Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of the shielding material in cm.

businessContext_i18n.en: Thickness of the shielding material in cm.

inputs.label: Half-Value Layer (HVL)
inputs.businessContext: Half-value layer of the shielding material for the gamma energy.

businessContext_i18n.en: Half-value layer of the shielding material for the gamma energy.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gama enerjisi için zırh malzemesinin yarı değer kalınlığı.

inputs.label: Dose Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor from exposure (R) to dose (µSv), typically 8.77 for air.

businessContext_i18n.en: Conversion factor from exposure (R) to dose (µSv), typically 8.77 for air.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maruziyetten (R) doza (µSv) dönüşüm faktörü, tipik olarak hava için 8.77.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
